text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Kokura Kinen is here. The race has
many favorable conditions for Nice Nature, such
as its distance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, it is precisely because of these perfect
conditions that Nice Nature feels even more
pressure not to lose.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature walks nervously into the paddock as
the cheers of the people from the Kokura
shopping district shower down on her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing their voices, she switches up her attitude
and heads off to the race, determined to meet
their expectations.
